html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 3-dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Three doses from primary series were administered. The primary series has been completed
Booster dose was administered approximately less than 6 months ago

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 3-dose schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: Three doses from primary series were administered. The primary series has been completed
Booster dose was administered approximately less than 6 months ago
